headline: Orca, Streamex Launch $1B Tokenized Securities Platform

article.title: Orca, Streamex roll out secondary trading infrastructure for tokenized securities
article.summary: Accredited investors can buy and sell the gold-backed GLDY token through permissioned liquidity pools operating on the Solana blockchain.

headline: Crypto PACs Spend $1M on Texas Primary Wins

article.title: PACs laud Texas primary wins, look to back more pro-crypto candidates
article.summary: While crypto industry-backed candidates won runoffs in Texas on Tuesday, industry PACs have less of a stake in California races next week.

headline: Google Insider Faces $800k Trading Scheme Charges

article.title: Google Engineer Charged With Insider Trading on Polymarket
article.summary: A Google software engineer was charged with insider trading on Polymarket, where he allegedly made more than $1 million betting on one of last year’s most popular Internet searches.

headline: BlackRock Sees 2% Fed Rate by Year-End

article.title: BlackRock's Rosenberg on Fed Rates, IALT ETF Strategy
article.summary: Jeffrey Rosenberg, portfolio manager of the iShares Systematic Alternatives Active ETF (IALT) at BlackRock, explains how the ETF is navigating the current economic environment on "Bloomberg The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

headline: $10B Crypto Exposed to AI-Driven User Loss Risk

headline: Musk Eyes $100B Crypto Stake in Tesla SpaceX Tie-Up

article.summary: Cash App users can now transfer on Solana, Ethereum, Polygon and Arbitrum, but executive Miles Suter says the firm is still bitcoin-focused.
